These events will occur in the later days. It is believed these enemies will come together to invade the land of Judea, and God will defeat them. God not only sees who are now the enemies of his church, but he foresees who will be so, and lets them know by his word that he is against them; though they join together, the wicked shall not go unpunished.

The enemy should make a significant attack upon the land of Israel. When Israel dwells safely under Divine protection, will you not know it by finding that attempts to destroy them are made in vain? Promises of security are treasured up in the word of God, against the troubles and dangers the church may face in the later days. In the destruction of sinners, God makes it appear that he is a great and holy God. We should desire and pray daily: Father, glorify your own name.
